title: OpenAI Gym Beta
summary: We’re releasing the public beta of OpenAI Gym, a toolkit for developing and comparing reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms. It consists of a growing suite of environments (from simulated robots to Atari games), and a site for comparing and reproducing results.
summaryZh: 我们正在发布OpenAI Gym的公共测试版，这是一个用于开发和比较强化学习（ RL ）算法的工具包。它包括一套不断增长的环境（从模拟机器人到雅达利游戏） ，以及一个用于比较和再现结果的网站。
highlights: We’re releasing the public beta of OpenAI Gym, a toolkit for developing and comparing reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms.
It consists of a growing suite of environments (from simulated robots to Atari games), and a site for comparing and reproducing results.
highlightsZh: 我们正在发布OpenAI Gym的公共测试版，这是一个用于开发和比较强化学习（ RL ）算法的工具包。它包括一套不断增长的环境（从模拟机器人到雅达利游戏） ，以及一个用于比较和再现结果的网站。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Welcome, Pieter and Shivon!
summary: We have two more team updates.
summaryZh: 我们还有两个团队更新。
